homeCta.title: Ready to talk about your institution?
homeCta.subtitle: If you want to see how Reto can integrate into your university, hospital, or lab, let's schedule a conversation.

hero.subtitle: A platform to reach physicians through validated educational content, therapeutic update campaigns, and specialty communities.

solutions.title: Solutions for the industry
solutions.body1: Reto gives pharmaceutical and life sciences companies a direct channel to support physicians in their professional development — through specialist-validated educational content, not advertising.
solutions.body2: Every initiative is built with academic rigor, hosted on a measurable infrastructure, and respects the ethical codes governing medical communications.

s1.title: Therapeutic update campaigns
s1.body: Sponsored educational paths that bring physicians up to date on new evidence, clinical guidelines, and therapeutic approaches in a specific area.

s2.title: Specialty communities
s2.body: Curated spaces organized by medical specialty where the brand supports the scientific conversation with editorial — not promotional — presence.

s3.title: Educational behavior research
s3.body: Aggregated, anonymized insights on how physicians learn, what they seek out, and where adoption of new therapies stalls.

s4.title: Sponsored medical content
s4.body: Academically backed editorial production: clinical cases, literature reviews, and virtual symposia with specialist faculty.

benefits.title: Why Reto for the industry?
benefits.subtitle: Medical education as a relationship channel, not a promotional one.

b1.title: Real physicians, real metrics
b1.body: Access to a verified physician audience with educational engagement metrics — not advertising impressions.

b2.title: Academic rigor
b2.body: All content is reviewed by specialists and built to continuing medical education standards.

b3.title: Regulatory compliance
b3.body: Aligned with industry ethics codes and the regulatory requirements governing medical communications.

b4.title: Actionable insights
b4.body: Reports that show what works, what lands, and where the educational barrier lies in each therapeutic area.

hero.subtitle: A platform for hospitals that need to train and certify their medical staff continuously, measurably, and with institutional backing.

program.title: Continuous training for medical staff
program.body1: Reto enables hospitals and hospital groups to build continuing education programs for residents, attending physicians, and nursing staff, with validated content and clinical traceability.
program.body2: Healthcare professionals access specialty updates, clinical cases, and practice exams from their daily routine. The institution accesses metrics that allow competency certification and support accreditation processes.

advantages.title: What's included:
advantages.a2: Institutional dashboard with metrics by department
advantages.a3: Completion records and reports for accreditation

benefits.title: Institutional benefits
benefits.subtitle: Continuing education that does not disrupt clinical operations.

b1.title: Traceable certification
b1.body: Every learning activity is logged and available for certifying bodies.

b2.title: Specialty-focused content
b2.body: Expert-curated material aligned with the hospital's critical care areas.

b3.title: Zero friction for physicians
b3.body: Staff access content from their phone during downtime, without disrupting clinical operations.

b4.title: Institutional model
b4.body: One license for the hospital — no individual contracts for each professional.

finalCta.body: If you lead a training or continuing education program at a hospital, we'll show you how Reto integrates into your institution.

hero.subtitle: A platform designed for medical schools and faculties that need to train better, measure more and institutionally back every step.

enarm.title: Institutional ENARM preparation
enarm.body1: ENARM preparation built from the institution, not bought by the student. Reto offers universities a complete infrastructure to accompany their cohorts well before the exam.
enarm.body2: Students access validated content, clinical cases, mock exams and real-time analytics. The university accesses cohort-level metrics that allow targeted intervention.

advantages.title: What's included:
advantages.a1: Updated case and mock exam bank
advantages.a2: Institutional dashboard with metrics per cohort
advantages.a4: Impact report at the end of each cohort

benefits.title: Institutional benefits
benefits.subtitle: Beyond ENARM: a long-term educational partnership.

b1.title: Actionable metrics
b1.body: Dashboards that show where each cohort gets stuck, not just how many passed.

b2.title: Validated content
b2.body: Academic material built and reviewed with specialists and endorsed by the institution.

b3.title: Academic traceability
b3.body: Every student interaction is logged and available to tutors and coordinators.

b4.title: Curricular integration
b4.body: Paths fit into the curriculum without requiring major restructuring.

finalCta.body: If you coordinate a medical academic program, we'll show you how Reto works at your institution.

hero.subtitle: Structured, validated and measured programs. Designed to fit the physician's real pace.

concept.title: What is a learning path?
concept.body1: A Reto learning path is a structured continuing education program on a specific clinical domain, designed in collaboration with academic institutions and validated by active specialists.
concept.body2: Each path combines theoretical content, clinical cases, formative assessments and discussion moments, organized into modules that respect the physician's real availability.
concept.body3: It is not an isolated course: it is a journey the physician can start, pause, resume and complete with institutional traceability.
concept.placeholder: Illustration: anatomy of a learning path

step1.title: Initial diagnostic
step1.body: Assessment of the physician's starting point to personalize the path.

step2.title: Theoretical modules
step2.body: Specialist-validated content, in brief and applicable formats.

step3.title: Clinical cases
step3.body: Real scenario resolution with immediate feedback.

step4.title: Formative assessment
step4.body: Continuous measurement of progress and areas to reinforce.

step5.title: Accreditation
step5.body: Institutionally-backed certification upon completing the path.

specialties.title: Available specialties
specialties.subtitle: Active or in-development paths, built with partner institutions.

s1.name: Cardiology
s1.body: Clinical management and updates in cardiology

hero.subtitle: Five pillars that sustain every Reto educational path.

pillar1.title: Accessibility
pillar1.description: Medical knowledge must be available where physicians need it: in their office, at the hospital, on their phone. We design every experience to work in real-world conditions: limited connections, short windows of time, diverse devices.
pillar1.placeholder: Illustration: multiple devices accessing the same content

pillar2.title: Case-Based Learning
pillar2.description: Medicine is learned by solving cases, not memorizing lists. Every Reto path is built on real clinical scenarios that force the physician to make decisions, justify them and review them.
pillar2.placeholder: Illustration: structure of an interactive clinical case

pillar3.title: Purposeful gamification
pillar3.description: We don't use points to entertain: we use progress systems to sustain motivation over months of training. Reto's gamification is designed by medical educators, not marketers.
pillar3.placeholder: Illustration: levels, achievements and progress system

pillar4.title: Analytics that matter
pillar4.description: Every interaction generates useful data: where a cohort gets stuck, which cases best discriminate between competence levels, which paths correlate with better clinical performance. Institutions receive dashboards designed for decision-making, not for show.

pillar5.title: Adaptive personalization
pillar5.description: Every physician arrives with a different starting point. Reto adapts the pace, depth and focus of each path based on individual performance, without sacrificing the program's rigor.
pillar5.placeholder: Illustration: adaptive path with divergent branches

hero.subtitle: The platform that connects those who teach medicine with those who practice and transform it.

problem.title: The problem
problem.intro: Medical education in Latin America faces three structural tensions that limit physicians' professional development.

point1.title: Fragmented access
point1.body: Clinical knowledge is unevenly distributed across institutions, regions and specialties.

point2.title: Missing metrics
point2.body: It is hard to measure the real impact of continuing education on clinical practice.

point3.title: A gap between actors
point3.body: Universities, hospitals and industry operate in silos, without a common channel to build education together.

manifesto.title: Our role in medical education
manifesto.body1: Reto was born from a conviction: medical education is where the quality of care patients will receive over the next decades is decided.
manifesto.body2: We are not a course repository or a certificate platform. We are an infrastructure that connects the institutions that train physicians, the hospitals that employ them, and the industry that produces the knowledge that keeps them current.
manifesto.body3: We build educational paths that respect the complexity of medicine and the rigor it demands.
manifesto.quote: Educating physicians is not transferring information. It is building judgment.

team.title: The team
team.subtitle: Physicians, educators, technologists and designers building the next generation of medical education.

hero.subtitle: Turn medical education into a strategy with real, measurable impact.

items.title: Direct access to medical communities
items.description: Connect with active physicians, segmented by specialty and constantly interacting within the platform.

items.title: Education that drives real engagement
items.description: Case-based learning experiences designed to integrate into the physician's daily clinical practice.

items.title: Measurable impact
items.description: Track engagement, interaction and performance evolution to understand what works and optimize your strategies.

items.title: Frictionless scalability
items.description: Deploy educational initiatives at an institutional or national level from a single platform.
